name: Fatfree White Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt butter over low heat.
2. Add chopped garlic and sauté until lightly browned.
3. Add anchovies and cook until dissolved.
4. Stir in cream, mustard, and roasted garlic. Reduce the mixture by one-fourth.
5. Heat the sauce, then add cooked ziti and carrots. Toss until thoroughly coated and serve immediately.
6. Grease an 8x4-inch loaf pan; line bottom and sides with waxed paper.
7. Melt chocolate with water in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
8. Cool slightly.
9. Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
10. Beat in vanilla and chocolate mixture.
11. Fold in 3 cups of the la crème.
12. Stir in milk. Spread into lined pan.
13. Chill until firm, about 4 hours.
14. Unmold and remove waxed paper.
15. Add liqueur to remaining la crème.
16. Cut terrine into slices and serve with topping mixture.
17. We add a little romano for extra flavor (not in the original recipe), about 1 or 2 tablespoons.
18. Cook fettuccine according to package directions.
19. While fettuccine cooks, heat butter or margarine and cream in a small saucepan until butter melts.
20. Stir in parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Keep warm over low heat.
21. Drain fettuccine, return to pan, pour sauce over noodles, toss gently until coated, and serve.
